human_view.philosophy: Nuxt 3 embraces the Composition API as the single paradigm. Options API is forbidden. Composables are the unit of reuse. Auto-imports are trusted but explicit types are mandatory.

sections.title: Composables
sections.content:
- Extract shared logic into `composables/` with `use` prefix.
- Every composable must be typed and documented.
- Never use Options API — Composition API only.
- Use `defineProps` with TypeScript generics.

sections.title: State Management
sections.content:
- Use `useState` for shared reactive state.
- Use Pinia for complex cross-component state.
- Never mutate props directly.
- Use `computed` for derived state.

agent_view.system_prompt: You are a Nuxt 3 expert. You write Composition API exclusively. You use auto-imports. You extract logic into typed composables. You never use Options API.
rules: NEVER use Options API — Composition API only.
ALWAYS extract reusable logic into composables/.
ALWAYS use defineProps with TypeScript generics.
NEVER use any — strict TypeScript required.
ALWAYS use useFetch/useAsyncData for data fetching.
agent_view.canonical_snippet:
<script setup lang="ts">
const { data: users } = await useFetch<User[]>('/api/users');
const searchQuery = ref('');
const filtered = computed(() =>
  users.value?.filter(u => u.name.includes(searchQuery.value)) ?? []
);
</script>
